Kimaru Boruett

Cornell ECE / Swarthmore Engineering

Incoming PhD student in Electrical and Computer Engineering at Cornell University working with Prof. Alyosha Molnar on future wireless systems, RF frontends, and analog/mixed-signal/RF ICs.
